description: 1. Lugged outsole for superior grip on various natural surfaces 2. SupportArkstab® stability technology, side synthetic bands 3. CS technology® in the heel for shock absorption   A state-of-the-art shoe for the outdoors. It features cutting-edge technology that transforms the shoe into a great user experience. The lightness of the shoe is a talking point while the superior grip and comfort is an added plus. These shoes are ideally suited for running.
